stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning synergy within a crew is most correct?

options.a: Synergy must be built up from the start of the mission (briefing) and be maintained until it comes to an end (debriefing).
options.b: Synergy establishes itself automatically within the crew, right through from briefing to debriefing.
options.c: Synergy is independent of the natural individual characteristics of the group members (communication, mutual confidence, sharing of tasks, etc.).
options.d: It is only the captain’s status which allows the establishment of synergy within the crew.
